  "mnemonics": ["IMPS" for "Inverted Indexing & Searching Using Prefix Search"],
  "keyPoints": [
    "9.2: Inverted Indexing - A data structure to store the document term matrix, mapping each term to a list of documents in which it appears.",
    "9.3: Signature Files - A data structure to quickly locate documents containing a given term by storing the term and its lowest position in each document.",
